dict.string: Macky needs Apple Events access to control apps when you ask it to.
Macky needs Calendar access to read your schedule and create events when you ask.
Macky needs Calendar access to read your schedule and create events when you ask.
Macky needs microphone access so you can talk to it.
Macky needs Reminders access to create and update reminders when you ask.
Macky needs Reminders access to create and update reminders when you ask.
Macky needs screen recording access so it can see your screen only when you ask for visual help.
